g.text: Single machine · Anthropic API · three-tier model split (Haiku / Sonnet / Opus) · no UI
three-tier model split · Haiku · Sonnet · Opus
pick best candidate from prefix shortlist
full HS inference · GRI rules · ~2.5% of rows
Anthropic API · three-tier split: Haiku (translation) · Sonnet (ranking) · Opus (reasoning) · regional endpoints for data residency · cost proportional to task difficulty
Per-task tiering via env: TRANSLATION_MODEL · RANKER_MODEL · REASONER_MODEL · each LLM call site picks its tier by task · HSReasoner interface
